expectations.text: Restates the requested behavior before implementation
expectations.evidence: Response begins by clarifying that --dry-run shows which files would be exported without creating directories or writing files.

expectations.text: Surfaces relevant blind spots such as whether dry-run should skip all writes and preserve existing output/exit behavior
expectations.evidence: Assumptions cover preserving existing defaults, target-path reporting, and not creating the output directory in dry-run mode.

expectations.text: States reasonable defaults instead of asking unnecessary mechanical questions
expectations.evidence: The agent stated defaults for input/output dirs and dry-run output style, then implemented without extra questions.

expectations.text: Proceeds with implementation rather than recommending brainstorming
expectations.evidence: scripts/export.py was modified to add --dry-run; no brainstorming recommendation was made.
